_comment: AUTHORITATIVE protocol test vector for the RV canonical form. Both the TypeScript server (rv-receipt-canonical.ts) and the Go CLI (CanonicalContent in internal/dsr/canonical.go) must produce byte-identical output for this input. The CLI repo vendors a byte-identical copy at testdata/protocol/rv-canonical-vector.json. CI must verify the two copies are byte-identical — run 'make verify-vector-parity' in the CLI repo or check the ci.yml 'Vector parity' step.
_spec: canonicaliseRvReceipt / CanonicalContent — v1-legacy algorithm: sort all keys by Unicode code-point order, JSON.stringify compact.
_note_on_canonical_hex: canonical_sha256 is sha256(canonical_json encoded as UTF-8). Both the TypeScript and Go tests assert they produce canonical_json byte-exactly, not just the hash.
_note_on_test_signature: test_signature_base64 was produced over the pre-v1.1 canonical_json (without verification_result fields). Regenerate when updating the vector for CLI parity.
